headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 13, 2026**
article:
The San Francisco Giants fell to the Baltimore Orioles in a 6-2 loss, with Casey Schmitt leading the Giants' offense. In other action, the Arizona Diamondbacks edged the Philadelphia Phillies 4-3, and the Minnesota Twins took down the Toronto Blue Jays 8-2.

Injuries and availability continue to impact teams, with several players being placed on the injured list. The Baltimore Orioles transferred Yaramil Hiraldo to the 60-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation, while Ryan Mountcastle was placed on the 60-day injured list with a left foot fracture. The Detroit Tigers transferred Parker Meadows to the 60-day injured list after a left radius fracture, and the Philadelphia Phillies placed Jonathan Bowlan on the 15-day injured list with a right groin strain.

Several trades and roster moves were announced, including the Baltimore Orioles acquiring Christian Encarnacion-Strand from the Cincinnati Reds for cash, and the Chicago White Sox trading Lenyn Sosa to the Toronto Blue Jays for OF Jordan Rich and future considerations.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall to Orioles in 6-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles took down the San Francisco Giants 6-2, securing a decisive victory. Casey Schmitt led the Giants' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Edge Phillies in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow win over the Philadelphia Phillies, with Taylor Clarke earning the win and Paul Sewald securing the save.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays 8-2**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured an 8-2 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Tristan Gray leading the offense and Taj Bradley dominating on the mound. Gray hit a home run, drove in three runs, and went 1-for-3 at the plate, while Bradley pitched 5.0 innings with 7 strikeouts and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Angels Take Down Reds 9-6**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels secured a 9-6 victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with José Soriano earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 10 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Mariners in 6-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners secured a 6-2 victory over the Houston Astros, with George Kirby leading the way for the winning team. Impact hitters for the Mariners included Julio Rodríguez and Cal Raleigh, while Isaac Paredes and Josh Naylor contributed for the Astros.

top_news.title: **Orioles Update Yaramil Hiraldo's Injury Status**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles right-handed pitcher Yaramil Hiraldo has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation.

top_news.title: **Christian Encarnacion-Strand Traded to Orioles**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles acquired 1B Christian Encarnacion-Strand from the Cincinnati Reds in exchange for cash.
